subject: [PATCH 7/7 v3] mm/memcontrol: remove unused memcg_stock code

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch removes unused code related to handling memcg_stock in the Linux kernel's mm/memcontrol.c file. The code was moved to page_counter_stock, making it redundant and unnecessary. The removal of this code simplifies the kernel and reduces its complexity. The obj_stock functionality is left untouched as it is still needed. FLUSHING_CACHED_CHARGE is preserved for use with obj_stock.
